info.title: PeeringDB REST API
info.description: REST API for the PeeringDB dataset. Provides list and detail endpoints for all PeeringDB entity types with full filter support matching the upstream PeeringDB API conventions.

get.description: Returns a list of organizations matching the given filters.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 250).

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Unix epoch. Only return records updated since this time.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name to sort by. Prefix with - for descending.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.
